title: Compliance with agreement as compliance with lease
doc_html:
§140. Compliance with agreement as compliance with lease

           The compliance by any mineral lessee or other party with the provisions of any agreement executed pursuant to the provisions of R.S. 30:137 through 141, or ratified in R.S. 30:139, shall with respect to the subject matter of such agreement, be deemed a full compliance with the provisions of the mineral lease or other contract affected by said agreement.

           Acts 1963, No. 13, §4.
doc_text:
§140.  Compliance with agreement as compliance with lease
The compliance by any mineral lessee or other party with the provisions
of any agreement executed pursuant to the provisions of R.S. 30:137 through
141, or ratified in R.S. 30:139, shall with respect to the subject matter of such
agreement, be deemed a full compliance with the provisions of the mineral
lease or other contract affected by said agreement.
Acts 1963, No. 13, §4.
